title: Libungan Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Libungan with a Z-Score of +3.60. This event has a severity score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Libungan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, and the wind speed is 4.1 km/h, which can exacerbate the heat. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
